'''Rob Jackson''' (born 4 September 1981) is a former English professional [[rugby league]] footballer. He played for [[Whitehaven R.L.F.C.|Whitehaven]] in [[RFL League 1|National League One]], usually as a {{rlp|ce}}, but also as a {{rlp|wg}}.

==Background==
Jackson was born in [[Salford, Greater Manchester|Salford]], [[Greater Manchester]], England.

==Playing career==
He played for the [[London Broncos#1994–2005: Broncos and Super League|London Broncos]] and the [[Leigh Centurions]] in the [[Super League]] after coming through the [[Wigan Warriors]]  Academy.
